name: Salt and Sanctuary
short_description: Explore a haunting, punishing island in this stylized 2D action RPG. Salt and Sanctuary combines fast and brutal 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics in a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, and desecrated monuments.
detailed_description:
A doomed sailor is shipwrecked on an uncharted island. In fog-shrouded valleys, where grinning, mossy corpses cling to rusted arms, shambling figures begin to stir. Beneath crumbling, salt-worn structures, labyrinthine passageways lead to unspeakable evil, long forgotten by man.

Salt and Sanctuary seamlessly combines fast, brutal, and complex 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics. Discover, craft, and upgrade over 600 weapons, armor pieces, spells, and items as you explore a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, desecrated monuments, and the fallen lords they once celebrated.

From Ska Studios, the award-winning indie studio behind a long list of stylistic, visceral, and brutally executed action titles that includes The Dishwasher: Vampire Smile, The Dishwasher: Dead Samurai, and Charlie Murder, comes Salt and Sanctuary, the studio’s most ambitious title to date.

supported_languages: English, German, Japanese, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish

reviews.review_text: Amazing game i just dont get tired of playing it over and over.
If they added online co-op, it would be generally a fairy tale, but otherwise the game is gorgeous, beautiful, interesting, a lot of combos, weapons, pumping

My favorite metroidvania souls-like. The game offers character creation, a class system, unique weapons and magic to experiment with as well. It doesnt have any build it online play, but playing with friends and my girlfriend on couch co-op is always a blast. I love coming back and playing this from time to time and highly recommend it for their asking price too.
A great metroidvania with a good story too.

I think the axes have hitbox issue's.


8 YEAR'S SINCE FIRST REVIEW EDIT

Dev updated the game little while ago after how many years, adds a new mode that rebalanced some stuff (meh), added some new stuff (cool), added a randomizer mode (good) but then removed sequence breaking in some ways (very, very stupid)

Overall, still a good game just go and play 1.0.0.8 (google it)
